name: Lemon Whippersnappers
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the ingredients together until well combined.
2. Roll the mixture into small balls and roll each ball in powdered sugar.
3. Place the balls on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
4. Bake at 350°F for 10 minutes, or until set.
5. Remove from the oven and let cool before serving.
6. Enjoy these melt-in-your-mouth treats!
